creator: stacey.pellegrino@gmail.com
text: Upon first login to x11/gdm (Gnome Display Manager) the X session restarts when there is desktop activity (e.g. starting an application) and presents GDM again. After second login the system is stable. This happens quite frequently but is intermittent nonetheless. x11/gnome3 is version 3.16.2 and x11-servers/xorg-server is version 1.17.4,1.
